Ermine theme plane

Every colour below reads a skin socket. Switching only flips data-theme / data-mode — the markup never changes.

theme
mode
/brb
accent fill, inverse ink · soft accent
pass warn fail note

ground · ground-subtle (card) · ground-defined (well) · ink · ink-soft · ink-inverse · rule · rule-soft · accent · accent-soft · pass/warn/fail/note + washes.
